title: What Scripture Actually Says About Self-Control (It's Not What You Think)
caption:
White-knuckling your sin is not what Scripture asks of you.

Every man who's tried to manage it by sheer force knows it doesn't stick. The problem isn't effort — it's source. Galatians 5 doesn't list self-control as a product of your grind. It's a fruit of the Spirit. The vine produces the fruit. You abide, and it grows.

The battle is upstream from the moment you think you're fighting. What you feed in the quiet shapes what you fight in the loud. You can't build an appetite at midnight and expect discipline at 10 AM.

"A man without self-control is like a city broken into and left without walls." — Proverbs 25:28. He can't be trusted with power, people, or a future. The governed man is the free man.

Abide. The fruit follows.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #discipline #galatians #proverbs #christian
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
